latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 04: IMMINENT. No new Lebanon developments in past few hours. Ground invasion ongoing, 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Litani bridge strikes cut evacuation routes. Updated 2026-03-20T04:05:34Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
Iran military renews threat to destroy Gulf energy if facilities attacked again
Ship burnt off UAE coast, another damaged off Qatar — maritime attacks continue
Pentagon seeks $200B+ supplemental war funding from Congress
Brent ~$115, EU gas prices +30% — energy crisis deepening
Lebanon: 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced, ground invasion ongoing

Mojtaba Khamenei consolidates power, vows retaliation for assassinations

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 02. Key developments: Netanyahu press conference — Israel complies with Trump energy strike halt. Lebanon death toll crosses 1,000 with 40 healthcare workers killed. Israel expands to northern Iran strikes. Gabbard testimony controversy. Mojtaba Khamenei consolidating power. All existing signals remain stable. No de-escalation signals. Pakistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches multiple missile volleys at Israel after Netanyahu declares Iran 'decimated'
latest_news.text: Iran fires multiple rounds of missiles toward Israel late Thursday after Netanyahu said Islamic Republic has been 'decimated' by war. Missiles intercepted by Iron Dome/Arrow. Continues pattern of Iranian retaliation.

latest_news.headline: 31st MEU Marines (2,200 troops) deploying to seize Kharg and Qeshm islands in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US Marines from 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit confirmed deploying to seize strategic islands in Strait of Hormuz. Pentagon weighing additional reinforcements beyond MEU. War entering 'new phase' focused on Hormuz reopening.

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'I won't put boots on the ground in Iran'
latest_news.text: Trump rules out ground invasion but adds 'if I was I wouldn't tell you.' Contradicts Pentagon Marine deployment narrative. No troops commitment despite Hormuz operation.

latest_news.headline: Qatar warns energy exports may take 'years to recover' from strikes
latest_news.text: QatarEnergy says exports may take years to recover even from current damage. 17% global LNG capacity cut confirmed. Force majeure on long-term contracts continues.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 04:04 UTC) — Hourly scan: (1) Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls legislation — new economic blockade angle. (2) Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars strike publicly visible. (3) Iran military renews threat to destroy Gulf energy infrastructure. (4) Ship burnt off UAE, another damaged off Qatar. (5) Pentagon $200B funding request. (6) Brent ~$115, EU gas +30%. (7) Israel-Lebanon: ground ops continue, no change. (8) Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. (9) Russia-Ukraine: talks paused, no breakthrough. No new conflict zones. All existing zones stable at current levels.
